selection_arena_requirements: Tournament classes must be finite and registered.
Promotion must consume R1 crucible evidence and R2 lifecycle states.
Demotion must be explicit and receipt-gated.
Merge must be lineage-bound, rollback-bound, and re-crucible-bound.
Router candidate pool entry remains separately gated and unavailable in R3.
pass_criteria: Tournament law binds a finite bounded selection arena.
Promotion law binds explicit promotion and demotion rules with no manual bypass.
Merge law binds explicit admissibility and re-crucible rules.
Historical tournament, promotion, merge, and rollback receipts remain PASS or BLOCKED in the bounded way expected by law.
Router, lobe, externality, comparative, and commercial widening remain blocked by order.
